title: vernonia elaeagnus
intro: Vernonia elaeagnus is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as ironweed due to its iron-rich properties. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Vernonia elaeagnus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Vernonia elaeagnus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
